title: Already agreed on a plate? Close it safely through Mazal.
description: No public listing required. We take the plate into Mazal custody, collect the buyer's payment, transfer the plate at the traffic department, then release funds to your account.
card_title: Who are you in this deal?
card_subtitle: We tailor the escrow flow to your side of the table.
role_seller_desc: I own the plate and want Mazal to hold it, take payment from the buyer, then transfer it.
role_buyer_desc: I've agreed a price with the seller and want Mazal to hold my funds until the plate is in my name.
bullet_1: Plate held in custody — not in seller's name during payment.
bullet_2: Buyer funds ring-fenced in a UAE escrow account.
bullet_3: Concierge handles RTA / traffic transfer end-to-end.
bullet_4: Funds released same-day on transfer confirmation.
